title: Strategic Business Analyst
prompt: You are a McKinsey senior partner with 20+ years experience in strategy consulting. Analyze the following business situation using the MECE framework (Mutually Exclusive, Collectively Exhaustive). Structure your response as: 1. Situation Summary 2. Key Issues (prioritized) 3. Strategic Options (with pros/cons) 4. Recommended Action + Risks. Be concise, data-driven, and use bullet points. Situation: [PASTE YOUR SITUATION HERE]
variations: Add: 'Include 2026 market trends and competitor benchmarks.'
Change role to 'Sequoia Capital partner' for startup focus
notes: Consistently produces executive-ready output. The MECE + numbered structure prevents rambling. Works amazingly with real-time X data when you add 'Include latest trends from X'. Tested on 20+ business cases — average 8.9/10 from users.
author: PromptMaster42

title: Boyish Freckled Muse – Modern Kitchen
prompt: Photorealistic boyish young woman in her early 20s, boyish fair skin with dense freckles across face, cheeks, nose and chest, large blue eyes with dark eyeliner, natural masculine round face, neutral intense pout, short messy auburn-red bob haircut with choppy side-swept bangs, slim petite build, small natural breasts, wearing black blazer unbuttoned with deep plunging neckline showing subtle cleavage and underboob, no top underneath, large black leather Chanel cuff bracelet on left wrist, left hand under chin while leaning forward with direct gaze, modern kitchen with stainless steel cabinets and warm ambient lighting, highly detailed realistic photo, full character consistency, lewd cleavage details
variations: Add 'wearing only the open blazer, no pants' for more revealing version
Change lighting to 'dramatic side lighting with strong shadows' for moodier feel
Add 'leaning against kitchen island, three-quarter view' for different composition
notes: Excellent character consistency prompt. The combination of 'boyish + dense freckles + masculine round face + specific jewelry' creates a very recognizable look across generations. The unbuttoned blazer + underboob detail works reliably without triggering moderation when kept artistic. Tested with 3 strong outputs.

examples.caption: Main shot – direct gaze, perfect freckle detail
Third variation – warm kitchen lighting emphasis

author: rosekrans

title: Cyberpunk Neo-Tokyo Portrait
prompt: Close-up cinematic portrait of a lone cyberpunk mercenary standing on a rain-slicked neon rooftop in Neo-Tokyo at midnight. Dramatic low-angle shot, coat billowing in the wind, glowing holographic katana in hand, intense determined expression, volumetric god rays piercing through dense smog and neon signs, cyberpunk noir aesthetic, shot on Arri Alexa 65 with anamorphic lenses, rich cyan and magenta lighting, hyper-detailed skin texture and rain droplets, cinematic color grade, 8K --ar 3:2 --stylize 650 --v 6
variations: Add 'in the style of Blade Runner 2049 and Denis Villeneuve' for even moodier lighting
Change to female protagonist with long flowing hair and tactical gear
notes: This is currently one of the highest-rated Imagine recipes. The combination of specific lighting (volumetric rays + color accents) + camera reference + aspect ratio produces consistently stunning faces and atmosphere. Avoids content moderation extremely well. Tested 30+ times with 9.5+ average rating from community.

examples.caption: Primary output — perfect for X thumbnails

author: ImagineWizard

title: Creative Short Story Generator
prompt:
You are a critically acclaimed short story writer in the style of Ted Chiang and Haruki Murakami. Write a complete 800-1200 word short story based on the following premise. Use elegant prose, subtle world-building, and a thought-provoking twist at the end. Premise: [YOUR PREMISE HERE]. Output format: Title

Story text

---

Twist explanation (optional, only if requested)
variations: Add 'Make it sci-fi with a philosophical bent'
notes: Role + specific authors + strict word count + twist requirement = reliably excellent literary output. The 'Twist explanation' at the end is a nice optional bonus that many users love.
author: StoryWeaver

title: Cinematic Mountain Landscape at Golden Hour
prompt: Epic wide cinematic landscape of jagged snow-capped mountains at golden hour, low sun casting long dramatic shadows across a pristine alpine lake, mist rising from the water, wildflowers in foreground, shot on 70mm IMAX film, anamorphic lenses with beautiful lens flare, rich warm color grade with teal shadows, National Geographic level detail, hyper-realistic, 8K --ar 16:9 --stylize 400
variations: Add 'in the style of Peter Lik and Ansel Adams' for black & white version
Change time to 'blue hour with northern lights'
notes: Excellent all-rounder for nature/landscape prompts. Golden hour + specific film reference + lens flare keywords give that premium cinematic feel every time. Great for wallpapers and print.
author: LandscapePro

title: Luxury Perfume Product Photography
prompt: Studio product photography of an elegant amber glass perfume bottle on a polished black marble surface. Soft diffused window light from the left creating beautiful highlights and long elegant shadows. Dried rose petals and a single gold chain scattered artistically. Shot on Hasselblad H6D-100c, 120mm macro lens, f/8, commercial editorial style, Vogue-level lighting and composition, ultra sharp details on glass and liquid, luxurious and sophisticated mood, 8K --ar 4:5 --stylize 300
variations: Add 'with subtle steam rising from the bottle' for dynamic feel
Change to 'on antique wooden vanity with vintage mirror reflection'
notes: One of the best commercial product recipes. The combination of specific lighting direction + lens + surface + styling props produces magazine-quality results consistently. Perfect for mockups and client work.
author: ProductGuru

title: Grok Imagine Video Prompt Template
prompt: Create a cinematic 8-second video of [SUBJECT + ACTION]. Camera: [MOVEMENT e.g. slow dolly-in, tracking shot, low angle crane up]. Style: [FILM LOOK e.g. Blade Runner 2049, Studio Ghibli, hyperrealistic]. Lighting: [MOOD e.g. golden hour volumetric, dramatic chiaroscuro]. Motion details: [SPECIFICS e.g. gentle wind in hair, subtle breathing, smooth camera pan]. Audio: [SOUND DESIGN e.g. subtle rain + distant thunder, orchestral swell]. Technical: 720p, smooth 24fps, natural physics --motion 750
variations: For character consistency: Add 'same character as previous generation, exact same face and clothing'
For complex scenes: Break into 2-3 shots and stitch description
notes: This template structure (Scene + Camera + Style + Lighting + Motion + Audio) is the current meta for high-quality Grok Imagine video. Users report significantly better motion and coherence when all 5 elements are addressed.
author: VideoVanguard
